summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SIPRO Property Development Operating System Phase A Foundation improvements. All core features working correctly including stage field consistency, role-based dashboards, and UI density improvements with Lead Lifecycle navigation.
passed_tests: Login with admin@sipro.com / admin123 works and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard displays Lead Lifecycle funnel with correct stage counts
Dashboard shows 'Management Overview' badge for super_admin role
Dashboard Task Queue shows actionable items
Dashboard KPI cards display project, unit, lead, deal, revenue, collection data
Sidebar has Lead Lifecycle section with Overview, Akuisisi, Nurturing, Appointment, Booking, Recycle navigation
Clicking sidebar 'Akuisisi' navigates to /crm?stage=acquisition and filters leads
Clicking sidebar 'Nurturing' navigates to /crm?stage=nurturing and filters leads
CRM Overview (no stage filter) shows all leads
Dashboard bottom cards (Finance, Konstruksi, Notifikasi) are clickable and navigate correctly
API GET /api/dashboard returns lead_stages, my_leads, unassigned_leads, my_appointments fields
API GET /api/leads?stage=acquisition returns only leads with stage=acquisition
All 32 backend API endpoints working correctly
Stage field consistency - all leads have 'stage' stored in DB
Role-based dashboard auto-detection working for super_admin
UI density improvements visible with compact design and proper spacing
Lead Lifecycle navigation section properly organized in sidebar
Stage filtering and URL synchronization working correctly
